data.name: ScanSettingsUpdatedRescanToApply
data.value: Scan settings updated. Rescan to apply.

data.name: RunScanAgainTooltip
data.value: Run the scan again for the selected folder

data.name: PreviewAndCopyShareImageTooltip
data.value: Preview and copy a share image

data.name: ShareImagePreviewHint
data.value: Preview the card, optionally include a project name, then copy the image to the clipboard.

data.name: RefactorPromptIntro
data.value: Edit the conversation starter if needed, then copy it into your coding agent.

data.name: RefactorPromptHint
data.value: This prompt frames the file as a possible refactoring candidate without prescribing a specific implementation.

data.name: RefactorPromptTemplateScope
data.value: Global setting for all repositories on this machine.

data.name: PlaceholdersHint
data.value: Insert these tokens anywhere in the template.

data.name: RefactorPromptTemplateEditorHint
data.value: Edit the default conversation-starter template used for new refactor prompts.

data.name: AboutOpenRepositoryFailed
data.value: TokenMap could not open the project repository link.

data.name: OpenLogsFailed
data.value: TokenMap could not open the diagnostics log folder.

data.name: ShareCopyImageFailed
data.value: TokenMap could not copy the share image to the clipboard.

data.name: RefactorPromptCopyFailed
data.value: TokenMap could not copy the refactor prompt to the clipboard.

data.name: RecentFoldersEmptyFlyoutSecondaryText
data.value: Analyze a folder once and it will appear here.

data.name: DispatcherUnhandledUserMessage
data.value: TokenMap hit an unexpected error. Review the log details before continuing.

data.name: UnobservedTaskUserMessage
data.value: A background task failed. TokenMap wrote diagnostic details to the log.

data.name: DomainUnhandledUserMessage
data.value: TokenMap hit an unrecoverable error. Review the log details and restart the app.

data.name: SummaryIdle
data.value: Select a folder to build a project treemap and metrics snapshot.

data.name: SummaryScanning
data.value: Analyzing project structure, token counts and non-empty line statistics.

data.name: SummaryCancelled
data.value: Analysis was cancelled. Previous snapshot remains available.

data.name: SummaryFailed
data.value: Analysis failed. Review the diagnostics issue and log details.

data.name: GlobalExcludesHelperText
data.value: Use gitignore-style rules, one per line. Use / for project-root rules, ! for re-include rules, and # for comments.

data.name: FolderExcludesHelperText
data.value: Use gitignore-style rules, one per line. These rules apply only to the current folder and override .gitignore. Use / for folder-root rules, ! for re-include rules, and # for comments.

data.name: PreviewUnavailableMessage
data.value: TokenMap only shows text files in the built-in preview.

data.name: FileTooLargeMessage
data.value: This file is larger than 2 MiB. Open it in the default app to inspect the full contents.

data.name: FileMissingMessage
data.value: The file is no longer available at its original path.

data.name: PreviewFailedMessage
data.value: TokenMap could not read this file.

data.name: ExplainabilityMetricUnavailable
data.value: This metric is unavailable for this file.

data.name: ExplainabilityGitUnavailableNote
data.value: Git context unavailable. Refactor Priority currently equals the structural base.

data.name: ExplainabilityGitBelowThresholdsNote
data.value: Git context is available, but all git signals stayed below the uplift thresholds.

data.name: ExplainabilityStructuralBaseNote
data.value: Intrinsic score from file scale, callable burden, and risk distribution.

data.name: ExplainabilityStructuralUnavailableNote
data.value: Structural breakdown unavailable for this file.

data.name: ExplainabilityGitUpliftPositiveNote
data.value: Bounded urgency boost from recent change and co-change pressure.

data.name: ExplainabilityGitUnavailableForFileNote
data.value: Git context unavailable for this file.

data.name: RefactorPromptGitUnavailableLine
data.value: Git uplift: unavailable because git-derived change and co-change inputs were not produced for this file.

data.name: RefactorPromptGitZeroLine
data.value: Git uplift: +0 pts because all git signals stayed below the uplift thresholds.

data.name: PromptTemplatePlaceholderRelativePath
data.value: Relative path of the selected file.

data.name: PromptTemplatePlaceholderRefactorPriorityBreakdown
data.value: Multi-line explanation for the structural base and any git-derived uplift behind refactor priority.

data.name: GetTreemapPlaceholderNoWeightedNodes
data.value: No weighted nodes for the selected metric.

data.name: DefaultStructuralDescription
data.value: Structural input that feeds the intrinsic refactor-risk base score.

data.name: Structural_code_lines
data.value: Code volume in the file. Larger files tend to accumulate more moving parts before method-level risk is considered.

data.name: Structural_total_callable_burden_points
data.value: Sum of per-callable burden after soft thresholds for method length, cyclomatic complexity, nesting depth, and parameter count.

data.name: Structural_top_callable_burden_points
data.value: Burden of the single heaviest callable. This catches one dominant method even when the rest of the file looks moderate.

data.name: Structural_affected_callable_ratio
data.value: Share of callables that exceed the soft thresholds. Higher ratios mean the problem is spread across the file rather than isolated.

data.name: Structural_top_three_callable_burden_share
data.value: Share of callable burden concentrated in the top three callables. High concentration means a small number of methods dominate the risk.

data.name: DefaultGitDescription
data.value: Git-derived pressure that can amplify urgency without dominating the structural base.

data.name: Git_churn_lines_90d
data.value: Recently rewritten line volume. Frequent rewrites raise urgency, but only as a bounded uplift on top of the structural base.

data.name: Git_touch_count_90d
data.value: Number of recent commits that touched this file. Repeated touches suggest ongoing friction around the code.

data.name: Git_author_count_90d
data.value: Number of recent contributors touching the file. More contributors usually increase coordination pressure around risky code.

data.name: Git_strong_cochanged_file_count_90d
data.value: Files that repeatedly change together with this one. This indicates a tighter blast radius when the file moves.

data.name: Git_unique_cochanged_file_count_90d
data.value: Breadth of different files that changed alongside this one across the recent history window.

data.name: Git_avg_cochange_set_size_90d
data.value: Typical width of change sets that include this file. Wider sets suggest changes tend to propagate.

data.name: tokensDescription
data.value: Token count for text files and directory rollups.

data.name: non_empty_linesDescription
data.value: Non-empty line count for text files and directory rollups.

data.name: file_size_bytesDescription
data.value: File size in bytes and summed directory size.

data.name: complexity_pointsDescription
data.value: Continuous intrinsic structural-risk score based on file scale, callable burden, and risk distribution.

data.name: refactor_priority_pointsDescription
data.value: Refactoring priority score that combines structural risk with recent change and co-change pressure.

data.name: total_callable_burden_pointsDescription
data.value: Combined burden across all callables after soft thresholds.

data.name: top_callable_burden_pointsDescription
data.value: Burden of the single heaviest callable.

data.name: affected_callable_ratioDescription
data.value: Share of callables that exceed the soft thresholds.

data.name: top_three_callable_burden_shareDescription
data.value: Share of callable burden concentrated in the top three callables.

data.name: churn_lines_90dDescription
data.value: Recently rewritten line volume over the last 90 days.

data.name: touch_count_90dDescription
data.value: Number of recent commits that touched the file over the last 90 days.

data.name: author_count_90dDescription
data.value: Number of recent contributors who touched the file over the last 90 days.

data.name: unique_cochanged_file_count_90dDescription
data.value: Number of distinct files that changed with this file over the last 90 days.

data.name: strong_cochanged_file_count_90dDescription
data.value: Files that repeatedly changed together with this file over the last 90 days.

data.name: avg_cochange_set_size_90dDescription
data.value: Typical width of change sets that include this file over the last 90 days.
